Author: greenteakitkats
Name: A Room Reborn (Testing)
Description: Experimental test build of A Room Reborn. Names Placed/Removed/Stored items correctly outdoors by cross-checking your storeroom and inventory contents directly, the same reliable method Deposited/Withdrawn already used, instead of guessing a HousingFurniture sheet row. Install this only to try it before it goes to the stable repo. Type /houselog to open it.
